title: Vadodara、Gujarat — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Vadodara、Gujarat的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Vadodara是Gujarat的一個城市，人口約2,200,000。The cultural capital of Gujarat, known for its royal heritage, Laxmi Vilas Palace, and as a major industrial and educational center.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
